arts.ttl: Manchester United’s reason for not signing Victor Osimhen doesn’t make any sense
arts.sum: Manchester United fans will be absolutely baffled by their club’s concerns over pursuing the transfer of Victor Osimhen while he was at Napoli. The Nigeria international firmly established himself as one of the top strikers in Europe during his time with the Naples outfit, but it seems Man Utd weren’t sure about the deal due […] The post Manchester United’s reason for not signing Victor Osimhen doesn’t make any sense appeared first on CaughtOffside.
